subtitle: Real people. Real encounters. This is what happens at FIRE CAMP.

testimonies.name: Kofi A.
testimonies.quote: I came broken. I left whole. I don't know how to explain what happened except God showed up in that room.

testimonies.name: Abena M.
testimonies.quote: The worship on night three. I will never forget it. Something shifted in me that has not shifted back.

testimonies.name: Emmanuel O.
testimonies.quote: My friends dragged me. I went with doubts. I came home a Firebrand. That was two years ago. The fire never went out.
